_comment: Golden Q&A for the end-to-end answer evals (run_evals.eval_answers): the whole loop corpus -> clean -> facts -> versions -> index -> answer, offline. Four families: numeric exactness (the exact figure with the right citation), freshness (the superseding document's value wins the conflict), refusal (questions the brain cannot answer must be declined — the anti-hallucination metric), retrieval (the right page is found and cited). Every answer must leave with verification=verified.

questions.q: what is the arr-usd for initech in 2026-03?
what is the revenue impact for globex?
what is our office plant watering policy?
what did globex ask for before the renewal?
